channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: The potential challengers to Keir Starmer
item.description: The potential challengers to Keir Starmer

item.title: BBC Politics: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to the Commons is clearer - but one big hurdle remains

item.title: The Telegraph: Starmer declines to replace Wes Streeting with soft-Left candidate - The Telegraph
item.description: Starmer declines to replace Wes Streeting with soft-Left candidate - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings
item.description: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: 👇 I think what some of the commentary on “Starmer will be hoping or is the beneficiary of a plot where Andy Burnham loses Makerfield” is Andy Burnham is crazy popular in the North West, and if he can’t win there (sca...

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham to make bid to return as MP as pressure mounts on Starmer
item.description: Burnham to make bid to return as MP as pressure mounts on Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
